query: Questions to ask a dealer about safety feature calibration and software updates before buying

request_params_without_api_key.q: Questions to ask a dealer about safety feature calibration and software updates before buying

search_parameters.q: Questions to ask a dealer about safety feature calibration and software updates before buying

text_blocks.snippet: Before buying a car, verifying its advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) are properly calibrated and updated is crucial for your safety.

list.snippet: Has this vehicle ever required ADAS recalibration?
Was the calibration done following a windshield replacement or accident?
Did a certified technician perform the camera and radar alignments?
Can you provide the official digital calibration report?
Are any safety sensors currently misaligned or throwing error codes?
Is the vehicle’s operating software currently up to date?
Does this specific model support Over-The-Air (OTA) updates?
Are OTA updates free, or do they require a subscription?
Which safety modules must be updated manually at the dealership?
Has the telematics or infotainment system ever been replaced?
Does the certified pre-owned (CPO) warranty cover ADAS sensors?
Will you perform a final software flash before delivery?
What is the typical labor cost if I need a recalibration later?
Are software updates covered under the standard bumper-to-bumper warranty?

text_blocks.snippet: To help you get the most accurate answers, tell me:

list.snippet: The make, model, and year of the car you are looking at
If it is brand new, used, or certified pre-owned (CPO)
If it has a history of accidents or windshield replacements

text_blocks.snippet: I can tailor these questions into a specific checklist for that exact vehicle.

serpapi_response.reconstructed_markdown:
Before buying a car, verifying its advanced driver assistance systems \(ADAS\) are properly calibrated and updated is crucial for your safety. [0] [1] [2]

### Safety Feature Calibration

- Has this vehicle ever required ADAS recalibration?
- Was the calibration done following a windshield replacement or accident?
- Did a certified technician perform the camera and radar alignments?
- Can you provide the official digital calibration report?
- Are any safety sensors currently misaligned or throwing error codes?

### Software Updates & History

- Is the vehicle’s operating software currently up to date?
- Does this specific model support Over\-The\-Air \(OTA\) updates?
- Are OTA updates free, or do they require a subscription?
- Which safety modules must be updated manually at the dealership?
- Has the telematics or infotainment system ever been replaced?

### Warranty & Future Costs

- Does the certified pre\-owned \(CPO\) warranty cover ADAS sensors?
- Will you perform a final software flash before delivery?
- What is the typical labor cost if I need a recalibration later?
- Are software updates covered under the standard bumper\-to\-bumper warranty?

To help you get the most accurate answers, tell me:

- The make, model, and year of the car you are looking at
- If it is brand new, used, or certified pre\-owned \(CPO\)
- If it has a history of accidents or windshield replacements

I can tailor these questions into a specific checklist for that exact vehicle.
